title: Natural Finish Round Laundry Wicker Basket Cotton Liner with Lid Bathroom Storage (Brown, Medium)
features: 【Extraordinary Outlook】Removable Cotton Liner: Equipped with a Soft, Removable Cotton Liner that is Gentle on your Clothes and Easy to Clean, ensuring Hygiene and Convenience. Detachable Lid: Features a Detachable Lid that keeps your Laundry Out of Sight, Maintaining a Neat and Tidy Appearance at Home.

【Design Principle】 The Basket offers a Generous Capacity, Ideal for Accommodating a Substantial amount of Laundry. The Basket features Trendy Neutral Brown Finish, making it Incredibly Versatile and Easy to Blend into any Interior Design Scheme.

【Applied Occasions】 Ideal for a Wide Range of Occasions such as Home Storage, and Office Collection. Perfect for Home, Office, or Living Spaces, this Versatile Basket can be used for Laundry, Toys and Clothing Storage and Paper Collection.

【Sustainable Quality】 Crafted from High-Quality Natural Wicker, this Basket is Sturdy and Strong. The Firmly Interwoven Basket can hold the Contents Safe and Sound. Vertically and Horizontally woven Wicker can maintain the Study and Durable Frame to ensure it maintains its Shape and Withstands Daily Use.

【Product Specification】External Measures: Large Top Diameter 42 cm Height 58 cm including the lid Medium Top Diameter 30 cm Height 51 cm including the lid Please note for hand made products, the color and measures allow 5% tolerance
